publishedAbstract: * The noobaa-default-backing-store is stuck in "phase: Creating" with error "Missing credentials in config": ~~~ $ oc get backingstore NAME TYPE PHASE AGE noobaa-default-backing-store s3-compatible Creating 2y341d6h19m35s $ oc describe backingstores.noobaa.io noobaa-default-backing-store...... status: conditions:- lastHeartbeatTime: "2025-05-08T10:18:50Z" lastTransitionTime: "2024-12-13T03:49:08Z" message: CheckExternalConnection Status=UNKNOWN_FAILURE Error=CredentialsError Message=Missing credentials in config, if using AWS_CONFIG_FILE, set AWS_SDK_LOAD_CONFIG=1 reason: TemporaryError status: "False" type: Available...... ~~~
publishedTitle: The noobaa-default-backing-store is stuck in "phase: Creating" with error "Missing credentials in config"
